name: EO Sec. 2 maps to the find-and-fix controls (H-14, H-15) and Sec. 4 to the misuse-resistant audit (C-4, L-14)
command: ruby -ryaml -e 'd=YAML.unsafe_load_file(ARGV[0]); s2=d["controls"].find{|c| c["section"]==2}["maps_to"]; s4=d["controls"].find{|c| c["section"]==4}["maps_to"]; exit((s2 & ["H-14","H-15"]).size==2 && (s4 & ["C-4","L-14"]).size==2 ? 0 : 1)' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/eo-control-mapping.yaml" && echo c22-sec2-sec4-bind 1>&2
